Finally aligned.

How we work

We provide expert guidance in navigating Tanzania's capital markets with confidence. Our team offers tailored advisory in securities trading, investment strategy, and market analysis-helping investors and institutions make informed decisions, optimize returns, and achieve long-term financial success.

Retirement Planning

Get clarity on your retirement date, income needs, and how to make your money last. No more guesswork.

Specialist advice for complex financial needs

Know exactly when you can retire and how to make your money last. We create detailed projections, optimise your pension drawdown strategy, and ensure you can enjoy retirement with confidence.

Retirement Planning

Navigate the complexity of pensions with confidence. From consolidation and transfers to drawdown strategies, we help you maximise your retirement income and make informed decisions.

Pension Advice

Pass on wealth efficiently to those you love. We create tailored inheritance tax strategies, set up trusts, and ensure your legacy is protected for future generations.

Inheritance Tax Planning

Stop guessing. Start compounding.

Leave stock-tips to the headlines. We build portfolios on peer-reviewed research, Corporate Finance Advisory , and the power of compound growth.

Evidence-based investment management Our investment philosophy

We deliver strategic financial solutions that drive growth in Tanzania and across Africa.

Structured Project Finance

Responsible overlay

Optional ESG screening available. Align your investments with your values without sacrificing expected returns.

Common questions about financial advice

Everything you need to know about working with a financial planner in Cheltenham.

A financial adviser helps you make sense of your money and plan for the future. At rockwealth, we start by understanding your life goals - whether that's retiring early, funding your children's education, or simply having peace of mind about your finances. We then create a comprehensive plan covering investments, pensions, tax efficiency, and protection, all tailored to your situation. Based in Dar es salaam, Tanzania., we focus on giving you clarity and confidence about your financial future.

We believe in transparent, fixed fees rather than percentage-based charges that grow with your wealth. Our fixed-fee approach means you know exactly what you'll pay, and it's often significantly less than the industry standard of 1% per year. For a £500,000 portfolio, this could save you over £80,000 in fees over 20 years. We offer a free initial consultation so you can understand exactly what's involved before making any commitment.

Many people successfully manage their own finances, but an adviser can add significant value in several ways: avoiding costly mistakes during market volatility, optimising your tax position through inheritance tax planning, ensuring you're on track for retirement, and providing peace of mind. Research consistently shows that advised clients achieve better outcomes - not just financially, but in terms of confidence and reduced stress about money. See what our clients say in our client reviews.

Our advisers hold Chartered Financial Planner status, Fellow of the Personal Finance Society (FPFS), and Trust and Estate Practitioner (TEP) qualifications from the Chartered Insurance Institute and STEP, demonstrating the highest level of professional qualifications and commitment to ongoing development. Our team combines this expertise with our evidence-based approach grounded in 60+ years of academic research.

Getting started is simple. Book a free, no-obligation discovery call with one of our advisers. During this 30-minute conversation, we'll listen to your situation, understand what's on your mind, and explain how we might help. We serve clients across Cheltenham and the Cotswolds, including Charlton Kings, Leckhampton, Prestbury, and Cirencester. There's no pressure and no jargon - just an honest conversation about your financial planning needs.

Still have questions? We're here to help.

Start with clarity, scale with confidence

Bes-tCapital helps families across Tanzania build financial security - with evidence-based investing, fair fixed fees, and advice that puts your life first.

First meeting at our cost
No obligation to proceed
Qualified professionals
